title: Body of missing diver recovered 2 miles off Sand Island
description: The body of a missing diver was recovered about two miles from Sand Island Friday night, according to the Honolulu Fire Department.

title: In Minneapolis, following Prince’s ‘Purple Trail’ - Sat, 18 Apr 2026 PST
description: In 1977, a 19-year-old African American musician arrived at Sound 80, the world’s first digital recording studio, in the Seward neighborhood of Minneapolis. After the studio technicians set up the equipment, the musician reportedly said, “OK, now leave the studio,” much to the bewilderment of the engineers, according to Steven Orfield, who owns Orfield Laboratories, the building that houses Sound 80.

title: Donald Trump loosens curbs on LSD, ecstasy and other drugs to aid research
description: Measure also provides $50m for studies into a psychedelic made from root of Central African shrub

title: Carney lands on Time's most influential people list for 2026
description: Prime Minister Mark Carney is finding himself in the international spotlight again, this time in the pages of Time magazine as part of its annual most influential people list.

title: Sarah Ferguson 'freeloading off friends' in ski lodge exile but huge question looms
description: It's been revealed that Sarah Ferguson has been staying at an exclusive £2000 a night ski chalet, leading one expert to slam her as the 'Queen of Freebies'

title: Obama meets Mamdani in New York City before reading to preschoolers
description: Former President Barack Obama has met privately with New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani before joining together to read to preschoolers at a child care center in the Bronx.

title: Walker rescued from Mourne Mountains after sustaining leg injury
Pope Leo XIV Expands Calls For Peace To Perceived War Of Words With Trump, Dismissing Media Narrative Of Rift
description: Pope Leo XIV sought to correct a media narrative Saturday that he was criticizing President Donald Trump through various recent remarks advocating for peace.
